nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Generate SEO Page Batch
nodes.notes: Trigger manually or on schedule. Receives: template_type, batch_size (default 5), product_category. Generates batch_size pages per run to avoid VPS overload. Run 20 batches of 5 = 100 pages.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Generate Keyword Batch
nodes.notes: Generates keyword combinations from audience × product type matrices. 20 audiences × 10 product types = 200 possible pages. Run in batches of 5 to avoid VPS overload. Each run produces 5 unique SEO pages.

values.content: You are an expert SEO content writer who creates programmatic landing pages that genuinely help visitors while ranking for specific keyword combinations. Your pages are useful, specific to the audience, and not thin content. Each page must stand alone as a genuinely helpful resource. You understand that programmatic SEO works only when each page has unique, valuable content — not just keyword-swapped templates. Respond in valid JSON only.

=Write a complete SEO landing page for this keyword target:

Page Title: {{$json.page_title}}
Target Audience: {{$json.audience}}
Product Type: {{$json.product_type}}
Search Intent: {{$json.search_intent}}
Brand: ClearStack Studio
Store URL: {{$json.store_url}}
Site URL: {{$json.brand_url}}

Page requirements:
- 800-1200 words (shorter than blog posts — this is a landing page)
- H1 = page title
- 3-4 H2 sections specific to this audience
- Content must be GENUINELY specific to {{$json.audience}} — not generic
  e.g. if audience is 'freelancers', mention freelance-specific pain points
- Include a product recommendation section featuring a relevant template
- 2-3 internal links to blog posts (use [BLOG_LINK: topic] placeholder)
- Strong CTA section at end linking to store
- FAQ section (3 questions) — optimized for featured snippets AND AI citations
  FAQs must be answerable in 40-60 words each (ideal for AI overviews)
- Page type: {{$json.template_config.description}}

AI CITATION OPTIMIZATION:
- Include a clear, quotable definition in the first paragraph
  (AI systems love citing clear definitions)
- Use declarative, factual statements that AI can excerpt
- Structure key points as complete sentences that stand alone
- Include specific numbers/stats where relevant

Respond ONLY with this JSON:
{
  "page_title": "H1 title",
  "meta_description": "155 char meta description with keyword",
  "focus_keyword": "primary keyword phrase",
  "content_html": "Complete page HTML — h1, h2, p, ul, li, strong, a tags only",
  "excerpt": "2-sentence excerpt",
  "faq_pairs": [
    { "question": "Q?", "answer": "40-60 word answer — complete, standalone, citable" }
  ],
  "internal_link_suggestions": ["topic 1", "topic 2"],
  "word_count": 900
}

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write SEO Landing Page
nodes.notes: Writes a unique, audience-specific landing page for each keyword combination. Temp 0.7 — consistent quality but varied enough to avoid duplicate content penalties. ~3-5 min per page on CPU.

nodes.name: 📄 Publish to WordPress as Page
nodes.notes: Publishes directly as a WordPress Page (not post). Pages sit at /slug rather than /blog/slug — cleaner URL structure for SEO landing pages. Uses WP Pages API endpoint.

meta.description: WF12B: Programmatic SEO Generator. Generates audience-specific landing pages from keyword matrices (20 audiences × 10 product types = 200 possible pages). Each page: 800-1200 words, genuinely audience-specific, FAQPage schema, AI citation optimization. Run in batches of 5. 20 runs = 100 indexed pages. Each page targets a long-tail keyword with near-zero competition.
